representative_tracks.song: More Than I Can Say - Remastered

rule_based_profile_paragraph: This listener gravitates toward pop, classic rock, electronic, synthpop, with recurring traits such as pop, 80s, classic rock, electronic, 90s. Their retrieved songs suggest a preference for energetic, driving, warm, uplifting, often centered on expressive vocals and restrained arrangements. Representative artists include Leo Sayer, Electronic, The Alan Parsons Project, Johnny Hates Jazz, pointing to a taste for emotionally detailed, intimate music.
